channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: She Built Her Brand as a 'Tradwife.’ Then a Devastating Family Crisis Made Her Rethink Everything (Exclusive)
item.description: Estee Williams' daughter, Estelle, was born with a ventricular septal heart defect in September 2025. The infant is now awaiting a live-saving organ t...

item.title: Keke Palmer Takes the Stage at the Film Independent Spirit Awards in L.A., Plus Hilary Duff, Kirsten Dunst & Jesse Plemons and More
item.description: From Los Angeles to Las Vegas, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Ex-NFL Star Tre Johnson Dies 'Suddenly and Unexpectedly' During Family Trip at 54
item.description: Johnson died on Sunday, Feb. 15, his wife, Irene, confirmed in a post on Facebook, adding 'We will miss him so much"

item.title: Ree Drummond’s QVC Clothing Line Is Packed with Comfy Styles on Sale for Presidents Day, and We Found the 10 Best
item.description: Add her signature collection to your closet

item.title: “The Simpsons” Marks Its Milestone 800th Episode with Cameos from “The Pitt: '”Noah Wyle Clearly Went All In' (Exclusive)
item.description: The Simpson's showrunner and executive producer Matt Selman tells PEOPLE they were "thrilled" when Wyle, Katherine LaNasa and Taylor Dearden participa...

item.title: Selena Gomez and Benny Blanco Dine at L.A. Hotspot Max and Helen's

item.title: President's Day Deals on Women's Athleisure

item.title: Nate Diaz Hoping For UFC Return, Wants White House Card
item.description: Nate Diaz has his sights set on kickin' ass on one of the most unexpected stages possible: the White House. The MMA star tells TMZ Sports he’s all-in ...
